---
title: "Self-Organizing Map Project"
author: 
  - Lin Qiu
  - Mahrukh Khan
  - Jake Douglas Wood
  - Nicole Barkan
course: "PSYCH 420"
date: "April 22, 2026"
format: html
---

## Introduction

Write your introduction here.

Example of display-style equations:

$$
\Delta w = \eta \cdot h_{ci} \cdot (x - w)
$$

Where:  
- $\Delta w$ is the weight update  
- $\eta$ is the learning rate  
- $h_{ci}$ is the neighborhood function  

---

## Algorithm

Explain the SOM steps here. Can include equations, e.g.,:

$$
w_i(t+1) = w_i(t) + \eta(t) \cdot h_{ci}(t) \cdot [x(t) - w_i(t)]
$$

---

## Implementation

Python code chunk example:

```python
# Simple Python example
import numpy as np

# Generate sample 2D data
data = np.random.rand(5,2)
print("Data shape:", data.shape)
```

Will eventually add **full SOM code here later**.  

---

## Results

Add plots or other outputs here. Python plotting example:

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.scatter(data[:,0], data[:,1])
plt.title("Sample Data Points")
plt.show()
```

---

## Discussion

Write discussion here.

## References

Paste references here.
